chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.317 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ HEARING OF CASE (PRIORITY): 1. For order on CMA No.900/2025. 2. For order on office objection as at ‘A’. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For hearing of CMA No.1966/2024. ----------- Dated; 15th April 2026 Mr. Shahzeb Akhtar Khan, Advocate for Respondent No.1. Syed Hussain Shah, A.A.G. -*-*-*-*-*- Mr. Shaad Khurram, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Najeeb Jamali, Advocate for the appellant, submits that CMA No.900/2025 has been filed on behalf of learned counsel for appellant seeking discharge of his vakalatnama. Learned counsel for the respondent No.1 with reference to the previous order has filed a statement alongwith certified copy of compromise application and the order passed thereon. From a perusal of the documents annexed with the statement, it transpires that the subject suit, wherein the order passed on the interlocutory application impugned in the present appeal, has been dismissed as withdrawn in terms of compromise arrived at between the parties. Consequently, this appeal has become infructuous and is accordingly disposed of alongwith pending application, if any. JUDGE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
